meaning: n.创始人,发起人,传授者,教导者
examples: For earned media, such marketers act as the initiator for users' responses.
An initiator sends a command request to a target device.
After that, the target sends the status to the initiator.
Reagan defenders blame this on the Democrats, who controlled the House, the initiator of budgets.
Email may have been a good choice of communication method based on how the initiator thought the conversation was going to go.
